_comment_target: EgoWM-style legacy render path (use_embodiment_adapter=false, legacy_render_variant='egowm'), full 891-clip droid_1k dataset, FSDP. Identical to train_drrobot_1k_legacy_8xl40_egowm.json EXCEPT max_query_points: 640 (use ALL sparse AllTracker points per step instead of randomly subsampling 128). max_query_points subsamples at train time only — it is NOT part of the precompute cache key, so precompute_cache_17f.pt is still a HIT.
_precompute_cache_note: Same data + num_frames + h + w + max_seq_len + ignore_prompts as the v1 legacy config → cache HITS instantly (cache key is data-only, not architecture-dependent).
_val_note: Held-out 10-scene set (data_wan_eval, scenes never seen in training). Runs every 2 epochs at 4 fixed timesteps per sample, deterministic noise. Mirrors the v3 config's val block so the 640 run is directly comparable.
